svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 998px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 1px;

div.div:
実行プリンシパル:
ec2:i-xxx (監視サービス)
IAM ポリシー:
Action: sts:AssumeRole
Resource:
arn:aws:iam::CUST:role/ReadOnly

div.div:
+ ExternalId (顧客固有文字列)
+ RoleSessionName (監査用)
+ DurationSeconds 3600 以下

div.div:
信頼ポリシー:
Principal:
arn:aws:iam::PARTNER:root
Condition:
StringEquals:
sts:ExternalId: "CUST-12345"
許可ポリシー:
CloudWatch/EC2 ReadOnly
